parameters.query:
INSERT INTO sync_runs (
  entity_name,
  run_status,
  started_at,
  fetched_count,
  created_at,
  updated_at
)
VALUES (
  $1,
  $2,
  now(),
  $3,
  now(),
  now()
)
RETURNING id AS sync_run_id, entity_name, run_status, started_at, fetched_count;

nodes.name: Postgres Create Stock Item Sync Run
Build Empty Stock Item Batch Summary

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO raw_tally_item_master (
  sync_run_id,
  erp_sync_id,
  item_name,
  item_code,
  hsn_sac,
  uom,
  base_price,
  tax_rate,
  source_hash,
  raw_payload,
  fetched_at,
  created_at,
  updated_at,
  deleted_at
)
VALUES (
  $1::uuid,
  $2::text,
  $3::text,
  NULLIF($4::text, 'null'),
  NULLIF($5::text, 'null'),
  NULLIF($6::text, 'null'),
  NULLIF(NULLIF($7::text, 'null'), '')::numeric,
  NULLIF(NULLIF($8::text, 'null'), '')::numeric,
  $9::text,
  $10::jsonb,
  now(),
  now(),
  now(),
  null
)
ON CONFLICT (erp_sync_id)
DO UPDATE SET
  sync_run_id = EXCLUDED.sync_run_id,
  item_name = EXCLUDED.item_name,
  item_code = EXCLUDED.item_code,
  hsn_sac = EXCLUDED.hsn_sac,
  uom = EXCLUDED.uom,
  base_price = EXCLUDED.base_price,
  tax_rate = EXCLUDED.tax_rate,
  source_hash = EXCLUDED.source_hash,
  raw_payload = EXCLUDED.raw_payload,
  fetched_at = now(),
  updated_at = now(),
  deleted_at = null
RETURNING id, erp_sync_id, item_name;

nodes.name: IF Raw Stage Stock Items Failed

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO item_master (
  company_id,
  item_name,
  item_code,
  hsn_sac,
  uom,
  base_price,
  tax_rate,
  default_ledger_id,
  is_active,
  erp_sync_id,
  source_hash,
  deleted_at,
  updated_at
)
SELECT
  null AS company_id,
  r.item_name,
  r.item_code,
  r.hsn_sac,
  r.uom,
  r.base_price,
  r.tax_rate,
  null AS default_ledger_id,
  true AS is_active,
  r.erp_sync_id,
  r.source_hash,
  null AS deleted_at,
  now() AS updated_at
FROM raw_tally_item_master r
WHERE r.erp_sync_id = $1
ON CONFLICT (erp_sync_id)
DO UPDATE SET
  company_id = EXCLUDED.company_id,
  item_name = EXCLUDED.item_name,
  item_code = EXCLUDED.item_code,
  hsn_sac = EXCLUDED.hsn_sac,
  uom = EXCLUDED.uom,
  base_price = EXCLUDED.base_price,
  tax_rate = EXCLUDED.tax_rate,
  source_hash = EXCLUDED.source_hash,
  is_active = true,
  deleted_at = null,
  updated_at = now()
WHERE item_master.source_hash IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.source_hash
   OR item_master.is_active IS DISTINCT FROM true
   OR item_master.deleted_at IS NOT NULL
RETURNING id, erp_sync_id, item_name;

UPDATE sync_runs
SET
  run_status = $2,
  completed_at = now(),
  error_count = $3,
  error_message = $4,
  updated_at = now()
WHERE id = $1
RETURNING id, entity_name, run_status, completed_at, error_count, error_message;

nodes.name: Postgres Fail Stock Item Sync Run

parameters.query:
UPDATE sync_runs
SET
  run_status = $2,
  completed_at = now(),
  fetched_count = $3,
  staged_count = $4,
  promoted_count = $5,
  skipped_count = $6,
  error_count = $7,
  updated_at = now()
WHERE id = $1
RETURNING id, entity_name, run_status, completed_at, fetched_count, staged_count, promoted_count, skipped_count, error_count;

nodes.name: Postgres Complete Stock Item Sync Run

parameters.query:
WITH deactivated AS (
  UPDATE item_master i
  SET
    is_active = false,
    deleted_at = now(),
    updated_at = now()
  WHERE i.erp_sync_id IS NOT NULL
    AND i.is_active = true
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM raw_tally_item_master r
      WHERE r.erp_sync_id = i.erp_sync_id
        AND r.sync_run_id = $1
    )
  RETURNING i.id AS item_id
)
SELECT $1::text AS id, COUNT(*) AS deactivated_count FROM deactivated;

WITH reactivated AS (
  UPDATE item_master i
  SET
    is_active = true,
    deleted_at = null,
    updated_at = now()
  FROM raw_tally_item_master r
  WHERE r.erp_sync_id = i.erp_sync_id
    AND i.erp_sync_id IS NOT NULL
    AND r.sync_run_id = $1
    AND (i.is_active = false OR i.deleted_at IS NOT NULL)
  RETURNING i.id AS item_id
)
SELECT $1::text AS id, COUNT(*) AS reactivated_count FROM reactivated;

Build Empty Stock Item Batch Summary
